name: Vanilla Bean Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the sugar and cornstarch. Stir in the half-and-half.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring until the mixture thickens.
3. In a small bowl, beat the egg yolks.
4. Gradually add about half of the cream mixture to the yolks, stirring constantly.
5. Return the egg yolk mixture to the saucepan and heat just to simmering.
6. Reduce the heat and continue to simmer for 2 more minutes, stirring continuously.
7. Remove from heat and stir in the butter.
8. Pour the custard into four small ramekins, filling each about halfway.
9. Top each ramekin with crushed vanilla wafers and raspberries.
10. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate until ready to serve.
11. Garnish with mint leaves.
Yield: 4 servings
